overview.description: AI-powered accounting automation platform for SMBs — invoice scanning, approval workflows, and ERP integration
overview.description_long: Digitoo is a Prague-based SaaS startup that automates the end-to-end processing of incoming financial documents for small and medium-sized businesses. Its AI reads and extracts data from invoices, routes them through multi-level approval workflows, detects duplicates and fraud, and pushes data directly into 42+ accounting and ERP systems (including ABRA, Helios, K2, Microsoft Business Central). The platform claims 90%+ reading accuracy and processes 79% of invoices without human intervention, saving clients hundreds of hours per year.

history.origin_story: Founded in September 2019 by a single female founder from Mohelnice, Czech Republic. Started as an integration partner connecting third-party services to automate incoming document processing, then developed a proprietary AI invoice-reading engine.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague as an integration partner for accounting automation
Raised 400K EUR angel investment from Machine Learning Investment
Raised 1.3M EUR from Kaya (Enern), Datasentics, and Nation 1; launched proprietary invoice reading engine
Launched Digitoo app (October 2022); reached 650 users without marketing
Exceeded 3,000 users; achieved 90%+ reading accuracy; joined SAP.iO Foundry Paris program
Expanded to 7,500+ companies; launched mobile app; grew to 42+ ERP integrations

metadata.notes: Female founder from Mohelnice, CZ — name not found in publicly available sources. Total disclosed investment is 2.5M EUR (400K EUR angel in 2020 + 1.3M EUR seed in 2021 per company website; additional rounds possible per careers page mention of 'tens of millions'). USD amounts converted from EUR at ~1.08. Offices are co-working space in Karlín, Prague.
